question: Will APR (ammonium perrhenate) Rotterdam price exceed 8000 USD/kg on May 31, 2026?
reason: APR Rotterdam price is currently below $8,000/kg and expected to remain below that threshold.
evidence: As of May 27, 2026, the price of ammonium rhenate (APR) in China is approximately $3,474.36 per kilogram. ([www-old.metal.com](https://www-old.metal.com/other-minor-metals/202507300002?utm_source=openai))

Rhenium prices have surged dramatically through 2025 into 2026, climbing from approximately $1,370/kg in 2024 to over $6,100/kg by February 2026—a gain of more than 340%. ([criticalstrategicmetals.com](https://criticalstrategicmetals.com/minerals/rhenium/price/?utm_source=openai))

The rhenium market remains firm, supported by tight supply conditions and steady demand from high-performance industries, with limited ability to increase output quickly. ([procurementresource.com](https://www.procurementresource.com/resource-center/rhenium-price-trends?utm_source=openai))
